title: Pure Discs - Trails & Tales
description: Adds four new discs from songs that were added to the game with the 1.20 Trails & Tales update!
body:
![purediscstrailstales-title](https://i.ibb.co/qWCSZLT/purediscstrailstales-title.png)
![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## 📘 About this mod:



**Pure Discs - Trails & Tales** adds four new discs from songs that were added to the game with the 1.20 Trails & Tales update!

This mod is intended to be used alongside my other mods, which I'm calling "**micro-mods**". I aim to combat bloated, overproduced mods with my simplistic, segmented **micro-mods**. Curate your own features without editing confusing config files and disabling recipes. Check my profile to find more mods, and complete your pack!



![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## 📖 What's inside:



**v2.0.0** - Full refactor, ported to 1.21.

### WARNING:
As this version is a full refactor, upgrading a world from 1.20.x to 1.21 can potentially result in missing content from this mod. Please plan accordingly. 

Listen to all five songs [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Al2I9WpOWU "here").

All discs drop from Creepers when killed by a Skeleton. This is the Vanilla way!

![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## ✋ FAQ:



**Q: Did you write these songs?**  
**A:** No. The artists who wrote the songs are credited on the discs. I only developed the mod.

**Q: These songs slapped so hard, a creeper was able to sneak up on me, and now I'm dead. Will you replace my stuff?**  
**A:** No, you accept all responsibility for your own safety when jamming these tunes. If you get killed while vibing to it, that's your fault.

**Q: I don't like the Creeper disc drops. Can you change them, or modify them all to be chest loot?**  
**A:** The default methods to obtain these discs were inspired by Vanilla Minecraft, and they are my vision. I also do not intend to add any of them as loot items for chests. If you have feedback, please join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/X6AsDnqex6) and share your thoughts.

![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)
#### **Leave a comment!**  
#### **Thanks for downloading!**
